format:
(UINT32) Unknown
(UINT32) Count

For Each Realm:
(UINT32) Unknown
(STRING) Realm title
(STRING) Realm description
remarks_html:
Realm list.

The first Unknown is usually 0. The second and subsequent Unknown is usually 1.

This packet is no longer used. S>C 0x40 SID_QUERYREALMS2 is used instead.
